title: 电影感叙事场景图
description: Using REFERENCE_0, transform the subject's appearance to a {argument name="style" default="trad goth"} aesthetic while preserving the exact pose, clothing structure, and background. Change her hair to {argument name="hai
prompt_raw: Using REFERENCE_0, transform the subject's appearance to a {argument name="style" default="trad goth"} aesthetic while preserving the exact pose, clothing structure, and background. Change her hair to {argument name="hair color" default="black"} with {argument name="hair style" default="choppy bangs"}. Apply heavy dark makeup, specifically {argument name="lip color" default="black"} lipstick and intense dark eyeshadow, and make her skin tone slightly paler. Add 2 facial piercings: a septum ring and a nostril stud. Finally, modify her layered necklaces to feature {argument name="necklace pendants" default="an inverted cross and a pentagram"}.
prompt_preview: Using REFERENCE_0, transform the subject's appearance to a {argument name="style" default="trad goth"} aesthetic while preserving the exact pose, clothing structure, and background. Change her hair to {argument name="hai
prompt_display_cn: 这是一个基于参考图的人像风格改造提示词，目标是在保持姿势、服装结构和背景不变的前提下，把人物改成特定审美风格。适合妆容变体、亚文化造型、角色风格迁移和造型方案预览。
prompt_template_cn: 基于【参考图】，将人物外观改造成【目标风格】审美，同时保持原图的姿势、服装结构和背景不变。将头发改为【发色】和【发型】。妆容改为【妆容描述】，包括【唇色】、【眼妆】和【肤色调整】。加入【面部饰品/穿孔】等细节。将项链、配饰或服装细节替换为【新配饰元素】。整体要自然融合，不改变人物基本构图，不要让背景和服装结构跑偏。
prompt_engine_cn: 基于【参考图】，将人物外观改造成【目标风格】审美，同时保持原图的姿势、服装结构和背景不变。将头发改为【发色】和【发型】。妆容改为【妆容描述】，包括【唇色】、【眼妆】和【肤色调整】。加入【面部饰品/穿孔】等细节。将项链、配饰或服装细节替换为【新配饰元素】。整体要自然融合，不改变人物基本构图，不要让背景和服装结构跑偏。
